name: Week 5 Legs (Quads/Hamstrings/Glutes/Calves)
description: W4 proved fresh legs = PRs. Squat jumped to 70/side for a clean 8 on the last set. RDL was skipped in W4 — bring it back at W3 weight. Leg press and calf raises were too easy — loading up. Leg curl found a real working weight at 110. Lunges stay at 40lb because they're already death.

exercises.notes: Full depth, arms in front. Thursday KB should have been light — legs should be fresh.
Warmup set: 55/side x8. Deep — same depth as your working sets.
W4: hit 70x8 on last set as a PR with fresh legs. This week: 70/side for all 4 sets. Full depth on every rep. If 70x8 is clean across all 4, try 75/side on the last set — that's your next frontier.
Skipped in W4, W3 was 65/side 8/10/10. Back to 65/side x10 for all 3 sets. If it moves easy, try 70/side on the last set. Slow eccentric, feel the hamstring stretch.

W4: 4 plates + 25/side — hips tight first set but second set full ROM. Probably too easy. This week: 5 plates/side. Full ROM check on set 1 — knee to chest depth. If hips are tight, take a longer warmup but don't back off the weight.

W4: 6 plates/side x3x20 — still too easy even with slow tempo and pause at top. Try 7 plates/side. If you max out the machine, switch to single-leg calf raises — halves the load, doubles the work, and fixes any L/R imbalance.
W4: 90 too easy, 110x12 hard but completed. Working weight is 110 now. 3x12 at 110. If clean on all 3 sets, try 115 on the last set. Slow negative — 2 full seconds down.
40lb DBs. Absolute death as always. Stay at 40. Long stride, back knee to floor. Don't split the last set — you've earned fresher legs this week. The finisher that finishes you.

tips: Thursday KB should be light enough not to matter — fresh legs proved = PRs in W4.
Squat: 70/side is the working weight now. 4x8 deep. If all clean, 75 on the last set.
RDL is back after skipping W4. 65/side x10, try 70 if it's easy.
Leg press: 5 plates/side — W4 was too easy. Full ROM or it doesn't count.
Calf raises: 7 plates/side. You keep outgrowing these. When you max out the machine, switch to single-leg.
Leg curl: 110 is the real working weight. 3x12, try 115 on last set if clean.
Lunges at 40lb: respect them. They don't care how strong your squat got.
Rest 3 min between squats, 2.5 min on RDL, 2 min on leg press, 90s on isolation
